goal: LogPanel enrichment — surface agent activity, task progress, subagent lifecycle, team events, enriched sessions, connection status, and upgraded filters

risks: Activity event flooding: sessionActivities is a snapshot that updates frequently. Without proper dedup/throttling, the LogPanel could render hundreds of near-duplicate entries per minute, tanking performance and burying real signals.

useRef diffing complexity: converting snapshot-based sessionActivities into time-series FeedEvents requires careful diff logic. Off-by-one or stale-ref bugs are subtle and hard to test without live data.
Filter UX clarity: jumping from 2-mode to 3-mode needs clear naming so the CEO instantly knows which mode shows what.
over_engineering_flags: Live ticker section adds a second rendering path for the same data. Include only if trivially simple.
Directive metadata enrichment is 3 lines — don't let it balloon into a full directive detail card.

projects.title: LogPanel — Full Data Enrichment + 3-Mode Filter
projects.scope_summary: Enrich LogPanel.tsx with all available data sources: (1) agent activity events from sessionActivities via useRef snapshot diffing with dedup/throttle, (2) multi-directive events from activeDirectives[] + directiveHistory[], (3) subagent spawn/complete/error events from session.subagentIds and activeSubagentNames, (4) task progress events from tasksBySession showing 'Task 3/5 completed by Riley', (5) team lifecycle events from teams[] showing formation/dissolution, (6) connection status events from connected state, (7) enriched session events showing model, gitBranch, latestPrompt, and feature context, (8) upgrade FilterToggle from 2-mode to 3-mode (Important / Activity / All). Extend FeedEvent.source union type. Add weight/category badges on directive events.
